hero.headline: The fastest Minecraft server you can run.
hero.subheadline: Built for performance without compromise. Stable. Configurable. Community-driven.

features.title: Performance
features.description: Async entity tracking, optimized chunk generation, and consistently lower MSPT under load.

features.title: Compatibility
features.description: Runs all Paper, Spigot, and Bukkit plugins out of the box. Drop-in replacement.

features.title: Configurable
features.description: Fine-grained control via leaf-global.yml and Gale config. Tune everything.

comparison.title: Why Leaf?
comparison.subtitle: See how Leaf stacks up against other popular server software.

sponsors.title: Powering Leaf's development
sponsors.emptyMessage: Be the first to support Leaf's development.

community.headline: Join 1,000+ server admins on Discord
community.subheadline: Get help, share configs, and shape the future of Leaf.
